description: A group of filter conditions combined with AND logic. Use multiple filter groups to create OR conditions between groups.
name: FilterGroup

filters.description: An array of filters, all of which must match (AND logic).

items.description: A single filter condition for a CRM object property.

propertyName.description: The name of the CRM property to filter on.

operator.description: The comparison operator for the filter.

value.description: The value to compare against. Not required for HAS_PROPERTY and NOT_HAS_PROPERTY operators.

highValue.description: The upper bound value for BETWEEN operator comparisons.

values.description: An array of values for IN and NOT_IN operator comparisons.
